title: Integrating my Harvest Budget to Monday.com
excerpt:
Hi I have a Harvest platform where I enter all my budget tasked hours and I am using Zapier to connect these projects to Monday.com board. 
My Task hours are not mapping correctly can anyone help? 
Thanks 
Ann

posts.author: Jigsawbb (Ann)
posts.cookedHtml:
